FAQ

Common questions

Do you provide free quotes?

Yes. We come out, walk the garden with you, and send a written quote within 48 hours. No obligation.

What suburbs do you service?

Adelaide CBD and most metro suburbs out to roughly 25km from the city. If you're not sure whether we cover your area, just call — we usually can.

Do you do one-off jobs or only regular maintenance?

Both. One-off clean-ups, pre-sale tidy-ups, hedge resets, and full landscaping projects are all welcome alongside our ongoing maintenance plans.

Are you insured and licensed?

Yes. Full public liability insurance and an SA landscaping licence. Certificates available on request.

What's included in a regular maintenance visit?

Mowing, edging, hedging, weeding, blow-down, and green-waste removal. Specifics depend on your plan — we'll talk through what your garden needs during the quote.

Do you bring your own equipment?

Yes. Mowers, edgers, blowers, hand tools — all our own, well-maintained, and ready to go.

What happens if it rains on my scheduled day?

We reschedule within the week. No charge for weather-related changes.

Do I need to be home?

Not unless you want to be. Most clients leave a side gate open or give us a code. We'll send a photo when we're done.

Do you remove the green waste?

Yes. It all goes in the trailer and gets composted properly.

How does payment work?

Invoice after the job, payable by bank transfer or card. No deposits required for maintenance work. Landscaping projects work on staged payments — we'll outline this in the quote.
